image_source.selection_reason: Dockerfile FROM quay.io/ascend/cann:8.5.0-a3-ubuntu22.04-py3.10 (Ubuntu基础) → 选择 Ubuntu 24.04

recommended_image.value: Dockerfile FROM quay.io/ascend/cann:8.5.0-a3-ubuntu22.04-py3.10 (Ubuntu基础) → 选择 Ubuntu 24.04

dependencies.source: docs/en/installation_guide.md - 安装依赖章节 + requirements.txt + requirements_dev.txt + pyproject.toml + setup.py

build_commands.value: pip install -e . (在线源码编译安装) 或 python3 setup.py install (离线安装)

value: make test-lit (ninja check-triton-lit-tests) - LIT编译器测试
make test-cpp (ninja check-triton-unit-tests) - C++单元测试
make test-unit (pytest python/test/unit/) - Python单元测试(需要NPU硬件)
make test-nogpu (test-lit + test-cpp + frontend测试) - 不需要GPU的测试

sample_commands.source: docs/en/quick_start.md - Quick Start章节 + docs/en/installation_guide.md - Installation Result Verification

value.name: CANN Community Edition 9.0.0
value.install_method: 从昇腾社区网站下载(需注册) 或 使用 quay.io/ascend/cann Docker基础镜像

value.name: torch-npu 2.7.1.post4
value.install_method: pip install torch==2.7.1+cpu --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu 然后 pip install torch-npu==2.7.1.post4

value.name: LLVM (预编译包)
value.note: 构建时依赖，由setup.py自动下载

special_dependencies.source: README.md - Latest Updates + docs/en/installation_guide.md - 环境准备/FAQ章节 + setup.py - get_llvm_package_info()

execution_log.command: docker exec ttfhw-triton-ascend-env bash -c 'apt-get install -y software-properties-common zlib1g-dev clang-15 lld-15 ccache cmake ninja-build make git wget curl python3 python3-pip python3-dev python3-venv'

docker exec ttfhw-triton-ascend-env bash -c 'update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/clang clang /usr/bin/clang-15 100 && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/clang++ clang++ /usr/bin/clang++-15 100 && update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/lld lld /usr/bin/lld-15 100'
docker exec ttfhw-triton-ascend-env bash -c 'pip config set global.index-url https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple/'
execution_log.output: pip镜像源配置成功(清华源)

results.name: 01-vector-add.py
results.error: ImportError: libhccl.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory. CANN包未安装。
results.reason: 样例需要CANN运行时库和Ascend NPU硬件，容器环境(无CANN、无NPU)中无法运行

documentation_gaps: CANN下载链接指向https://www.hiascend.com/cann/download但需要注册登录，文档未提供直接下载URL或wget命令
editable安装(pip install -e .)存在已知覆盖问题：PyPI triton包优先级高于editable安装的后端文件，FAQ中记录了此问题但未在安装步骤中说明需要手动修复
C++单元测试默认不构建(TRITON_BUILD_UT=OFF)，文档未明确说明如何启用C++测试构建
Python单元测试(make test-unit)需要NPU硬件但文档未在测试章节明确标注硬件要求
requirements.txt中torch-npu==2.7.1与安装指南中的torch_npu 2.7.1.post4版本号不一致

problems_encountered.问题: Ubuntu 24.04 PEP 668保护导致pip install失败
editable安装(pip install -e .)未正确覆盖PyPI triton包，导致triton.backends.ascend模块找不到
problems_encountered.解决方案: 手动创建后端符号链接(ln -sf /workspace/third_party/ascend/backend到dist-packages/triton/backends/ascend)并复制编译的libtriton.so和libentryC.so到安装位置，同步源码树Python文件
problems_encountered.来源: docs/en/installation_guide.md FAQ章节 - 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named triton._C.libtriton.ascend'问题描述了此问题但解决方案为重装

problems_encountered.解决方案: FileCheck模式匹配失败，属于测试期望输出与实际输出的小差异，不影响核心功能

problems_encountered.问题: Gluon前端测试test_convert_layout失败：API参数类型不匹配
problems_encountered.解决方案: create_convert_layout()期望(ir.value, ir.type)但传入(ir.type, ir.value)，可能是API接口变更导致的测试未更新

problems_encountered.问题: 样例01-vector-add.py失败：缺少CANN运行时库libhccl.so
problems_encountered.解决方案: CANN是Ascend NPU的软件栈，需要从https://www.hiascend.com/cann/download下载安装(需注册)，或使用quay.io/ascend/cann Docker基础镜像。当前容器环境无CANN且无Ascend NPU硬件，样例无法运行
problems_encountered.来源: docs/en/installation_guide.md - Check Installation Environment章节 + FAQ

problems_encountered.问题: torch未安装导致样例无法导入
